verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For a long time I travelled Down a long lonely road; My heart was so heavy in sin, I sank low. Then I heard about Jesus, What a wonderful hour; I'm so glad that I found out He could bring me out Through His saving power.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thank God I am free, free, free From this world of sin. Been washed in the blood of Jesus, I've been born again. Hallelujah, I'm saved, saved, saved By His wonderful grace. I'm so glad that I found out He could bring me out And show me the way.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a bird out of prison That's taken its flight; Like a blind man that God Gave back his sight. Like a poor wretched beggar That's found fortune and fame, I'm so glad that I found out He could bring me out Thro' His Holy name.
